svg.title: FFMA Architecture Diagram — Dhanashree Crop Solutions
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: client devices at top, backend services in the middle, data and external integrations at the bottom. Field staff Android app and manager web browser connect to a Django REST API on Render, which dispatches to Celery workers, Supabase PostgreSQL, Cloudinary storage, and external WhatsApp/SMS gateways.
